title: Wind farm proposal discussed near Taranaki coast
text: A proposed wind farm near Taranaki could connect to existing transmission infrastructure. Local planners said the project would need careful assessment of landscape and protected area constraints.

title: Solar investment expands across Marlborough
text: A renewable energy developer is investigating a solar farm in Marlborough. The site has strong sunshine hours, low slope, and nearby grid capacity.

title: Hawke's Bay councils review renewable energy zones
text: Hawke's Bay councils are reviewing planning rules for solar energy projects. The review considers productive land, electricity demand, and access to transmission lines.

title: Canterbury communities consider wind and solar projects
text: Several Canterbury communities are discussing renewable energy projects, including wind turbines in foothill areas and solar farms on flatter land near existing roads.
